jurisdiction_name: THE VILLAGE OF INDIAN HILL CITY
narrative:
The Village Of Indian Hill City has 5,357 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
